description: Sorry to step in, sir, Edgelord did want the clean little Mudbray-to-Mudsdale mirror, he really did. But there are five prints, you see — three Mudbray and two Mudsdale across four sets — and a 1:1 edge would have orphaned three of them, and then the whole thing would have wanted re-anchoring the moment a sixth print landed. So I have, if it's not too much trouble, proposed the mudbray-line character node instead. It is the exact 3+2 twin of the drilbur-line node and follows the breloom-line precedent (commissioned when its two-stage line went fresh in the very same Destined Rivals set). I do hope it helps.
citations: [Pokemon Sun and Moon, Game Freak / Creatures Inc. / Nintendo, 2016]
[PokemonTCG.io API: swsh4-96 — Mudbray Vivid Voltage trivia pass, IP-verified]

node_proposed.members: 3 Mudbray (SS Base 105, Vivid Voltage 096, Destined Rivals 107) + 2 Mudsdale (Burning Shadows 78, Destined Rivals 108)

other_candidates_considered: Primeape DRI-091, Hippowdon DRI-106, Arven's Maschiff DRI-138 — no shared load-bearing edge among the remaining fresh Destined Rivals Pokemon; Hippowdon is a single-print Ground-type with no in-corpus Hippopotas, no line-node threshold met. Arven's Maschiff is a Trainer's-Pokemon card (Arven ownership prefix) — a future arven-cohort character-node candidate IF more Arven's-prefixed cards accumulate (Arven's Toedscruel DRI-110 already in corpus = 2 prints; one short of the 3-print threshold; stage as future-watch).

Five Duskmourn MTG trivia-passed cards (Lionheart Glimmer 19, Patchwork Beastie 195, Rootwise Survivor 196, Spineseeker Centipede 199, Living Phone 20) — not examined for an edge this wave; the Mudbray-line node was the higher-yield single operation. Stage for a future Edgelord pass.
next_pass_suggestions: Arven's-Pokemon cohort: Arven's Maschiff DRI-138 + Arven's Toedscruel DRI-110 are in corpus (2 prints). If a third Arven's-prefixed card lands, commission an arven-trainer-cohort character node (precedent: Ethan's Pinsir / Ethan's Slugma, Team Rocket's Mareep / Team Rocket's Venture Bomb — trainer-ownership cohorts already present in Destined Rivals).
Mudbray SS-Base 105 needs its manual-review + vision pass resolved; its mudbray-line membership stands regardless but its body and tags_hub are currently empty.
Duskmourn trivia-passed batch (cards 19, 195, 196, 199, 20) is unswept for edges.
